input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Tests that try to execute full Maven builds may perform plugin/artifact resolution and touch the local Maven repository; keep coverage focused on in-process APIs or isolate such behavior in temporary directories if attempted.
Existing 2.0.6 tests using ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException constructors must be adjusted to the 2.0.7 API signatures.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed: org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 resolves its Maven, Plexus, Wagon, and ClassWorlds dependencies transitively, and the reported failure is from test code using constructor signatures that changed in the resolved Maven artifact rather than from missing dependencies, Docker services, or required environment properties.
